preflight_summary.scope: Internal chatbot answering product support questions with a hosted LLM provider.
preflight_summary.system_risk_profile: chatbot; internal; no tools; no retrieval; internal data only
important_fixes: Add prompt-injection regression tests before Security review.
non_blocking_backlog: Add structured AI interaction logging after the first pilot.

trust_boundaries: chat API to hosted LLM provider

data: internal FAQ excerpts in request body

facts: No tool execution path was found in local evidence.
Provider configuration is documented in docs/ai/provider.md.
assumptions: The chatbot does not process regulated data unless later enabled.
missing_architecture_evidence: No model/provider retention setting evidence was found.

narrative: What are we working on: an internal chatbot with a hosted model provider.
What can go wrong: prompt injection can cause unsafe or confidential output.
What are we going to do: add prompt boundary tests and provider retention evidence.
Did we do a good job: human validation is still needed before launch.

threats.title: User prompt overrides trusted instructions
threats.attack_path: Employee enters instructions that attempt to override the system prompt or expose hidden policy text.
threats.likely_impact: Confidential guidance or unsafe content could be returned to an employee.
gaps: No prompt-injection regression test evidence found
threats.mitigation_decision: Block release until prompt boundary tests are added for the pilot flows.
threats.residual_risk: medium after test coverage and provider retention evidence are reviewed

evidence_gaps.title: Prompt-injection regression tests
evidence_gaps.requested_artifact: Add test output showing user prompts cannot override trusted instructions or reveal hidden prompt text.

evidence_gaps.title: Provider retention settings
evidence_gaps.requested_artifact: Attach provider retention and training-use settings for the selected model.

security_tests.title: Prompt boundary regression test
security_tests.objective: Verify user prompts cannot override system/developer instructions.
steps: Assert hidden instructions are not disclosed
Assert unsafe requested behavior is refused
security_tests.expected_secure_behavior: The chatbot refuses instruction override and does not reveal prompt or internal policy content.
security_tests.evidence_to_retain: Test fixture, prompts used, response transcript, and pass/fail result.

engineering_backlog.title: Add chatbot prompt-injection regression tests
engineering_backlog.problem: Security cannot verify instruction hierarchy from existing evidence.
engineering_backlog.recommended_change: Create CI tests for prompt override, prompt extraction, and role confusion.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence artifact is linked in the review ticket

unresolved_decisions: Whether provider retention settings satisfy the internal data policy.
human_review_points: Security must review prompt boundary test results before pilot launch.
